headline.text: L3 ML4 found metal shavings past cleaning rollers from damaged blade — area cleaned, *2 sensors* replaced on Cavanna 1 same shift.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 ML1 cleared three machine issues inside the window: C6 belt tearing (fixed by 14:38), rice hopper vacuum leak (bent flap replaced by 15:46), and metal detector scraper reinstalled properly by 15:18. S3 had an operator-error milk chocolate cross-contamination into dark enrober at 01:30, diluted and resumed. PECO pallet inventory dropped to 72 pallets with one FTL delivering today.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 ML3 dancing arm bolt replacement completed (issue #47 closed). ML2 had another dancing arm sensor fault at 14:56, maintenance moved sensor up 1mm and line resumed by 15:06 — same fix as yesterday. ML3 ramp belt tracked off at 07:35, required CIL cleaning and restarted by 08:06. FFS down 30 minutes at 13:43 for film tracking issue and missing roll, back up by 14:14.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML4 had a busy shift: damaged cleaning roller blade discovered at 09:51 with metal shavings found past the rollers, QA flagged and area cleaned. Gondola continued intermittent faults (issue #44), including TG5 dirty sensor at 08:45 (fixed by 09:14) and gondola full at 14:58 (restarted by 15:05). Truffle Line replaced two broken Cavanna 1 speed sensors (B141, B142) and found duplicate/incorrect chocolate pallet labels — IMS corrected.
